race.description: 20 Years Of Living Legends Trophy Hcp (Bm84)
race.comment: Tricky race. DUCHESS ZOU (2) found her scenario last start at Sandown Hillside and capitalised, getting her preferred soft (bordering on heavy) ground and coming away from a handy position. Up a fair bit in the weights off that but will get a similar scenario here and is well placed to go on with it. KHADIME (10) just missed the bob here second up in a good effort having won well first up at Seymour. She draws well and should take beating again. THIS TIME GIRL (12) hasn't threatened her past couple but wasn't far away last time and can settle closer from a good draw now. STYLISH (3) is a two-time fresh winner who hasn't missed a place here. She'll be ready to go off two trials, winning the latest.
